entries.notes: Direct pricing. No fees, no platform markup, no surprise taxes.

VRBO fees rolled into nightly rate per owner direction on 2026-04-25. Exact checkout screenshot: $1,792.10/night all-in, tax 10.38% on base. Total for May 16-23 (7 nights): $13,847 (vs direct $10,500 — saving $3,347).
Airbnb nightly rate per owner-provided checkout screenshot 2026-04-25. $1,844/night all-in, tax 11.77% on base. Total for May 16-23 (7 nights): $14,427 (vs direct $10,500 — saving $3,927).
